data.title: [resolve-model-id.sh]: sprint semantic-conflict check requires haiku tier -> FATAL when config key 'model.haiku' is absent or empty in host project
data.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior (reported by host project using the DSO plugin)

#### Expected Behavior

When a host project does not configure the haiku model tier in its config (e.g., the project only uses sonnet and opus), internal infrastructure checks such as the sprint skill's semantic-conflict check should either:
(a) gracefully degrade / skip the haiku-dependent step, or
(b) fall back to a default model ID without emitting a FATAL error.

Per the skill spec observed in the user's log: "per skill spec this is fail-open" — the current behavior is inconsistent with that spec.

#### Actual Behavior

The host project reports the following output from the semantic-conflict check inside a sprint batch:

\`\`\`
---semantic---
FATAL: resolve-model-id.sh failed for tier 'haiku': Error: config key 'model.haiku' is absent or empty in the config file
\`\`\`

\`plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-model-id.sh\` emits FATAL when the requested model tier (haiku) is not configured in the host project's config. The caller (sprint's post-batch semantic check) does not trap this non-zero exit and surfaces the FATAL as a failure, even though subsequent steps (format/lint/tests all PASS) run correctly.

Observed log excerpt:
\`\`\`
⏺ No conflicts. Semantic check failed due to a config issue (haiku model key missing) — per skill spec this is fail-open.
\`\`\`

The agent acknowledges fail-open intent but the FATAL line still appears in the user-visible log, signaling a health-check failure.

### 3. Technical Environment

* Script: \`plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-model-id.sh\`
* Caller (observed): sprint semantic-conflict check / post-batch validate-phase
* Host project: does not configure \`model.haiku\` in \`.claude/dso-config.conf\` (or equivalent)
* Plugin version (from user log): \`/Users/joeoakhart/.claude/plugins/cache/digital-service-orchestra/dso/1.12.10\`

### 4. Action History

* User-reported only. No reproduction attempted yet in this repo.

### 5. Investigation Pointers (non-speculative)

* \`resolve-model-id.sh\` — check its exit behavior when a requested tier is absent; confirm whether it is expected to fail-open (exit 0 with default) or hard-fail (non-zero)
* Callers of \`resolve-model-id.sh\` that pass tier \`haiku\` — identify which callers require haiku specifically vs. optional/preferred
* The specific semantic-conflict check in sprint (or its underlying validate-phase logic) — determine whether the FATAL should be swallowed when the skill spec declares fail-open
* Config resolution: \`plugins/dso/scripts/read-config.sh\` and CONFIG-RESOLUTION.md — confirm whether \`model.haiku\` has a documented default when absent from host config
